BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"1. I feel sad much of the time.","Q1":"1. I feel more discouraged about my future than I used to be.","Q2":"1. I have failed more than I should have.","Q3":"1. I don't enjoy things as much as I used to.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"2. I expect to be punished.","Q6":"1. I have lost confidence in myself.","Q7":"1. I am more critical of myself than I used to be.","Q8":"1. I have thoughts of killing myself, but I would not carry them out.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"1. I feel more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"1. I am less interested in other people or things than before.","Q12":"1. I find it more difficult to make decisions than usual.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"1. I don't consider myself as worthwhile and useful as I used to.","Q15":"1. I have less energy than I used to have.","Q16":"3-. I wake up 1-2 hours early and can't get back to sleep.","Q17":"1. I am more irritable than usual.","Q18":"0. I have not experienced any change in my appetite.","Q19":"1. I can't concentrate as well as usual.","Q20":"1. I get more tired or fatigued more easily than usual.","Q21":"2. I am much less interested in sex now."}
